UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALEXANDER, ZACHERY SEIELSTAD, ERIC LEYES, JOHN ALLEN, STUART THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 43 BELVEDERE ST, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522 JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
